auth.login.title: Sign In
auth.login.description: Sign in to your json account using your preferred provider
auth.login.heading: Welcome to json
auth.login.subtitle: Choose a sign-in method to get started
auth.login.terms: By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.login.email_subtitle: Enter your email address to receive a verification code
auth.login.verify_hint: We've sent a 6-digit verification code to
auth.brand.feature1: 50+ free online tools — no sign-up required
auth.brand.feature2: Privacy-first — your data stays in your browser
auth.brand.feature4: Multi-language support — English, Chinese, Japanese & more
auth.me.title: My Account
auth.me.description: Manage your ToolboxNova account, usage quotas, history, and favorite tools.
auth.me.heading: My Profile
auth.me.hero.subtitle: Manage your account info, usage quotas, history, and favorite tools.
auth.me.name: Name
auth.me.logout_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.me.field.name: Name
auth.me.plan.free_desc: You are currently on the free plan.
auth.me.plan.upgrade_cta: Upgrade for more quotas and premium features
auth.me.recent.empty: No recent usage yet. Start using a tool and it will appear here.
auth.me.history.empty: No history yet. Your activity will show up here after you use tools.
auth.me.favorites.empty: No favorites yet. Favorite tools will appear here for quick access.
auth.me.ai_stats.empty: You haven't used any AI tools yet. Try the AI image generator or competitor analysis tool.
auth.me.ai_stats.desc: This shows your AI tool usage this month to help you track quota consumption and task history.
auth.me.files.empty: No files yet. Processed or exported files will show up here.
auth.me.files.privacy: File records may be automatically cleaned up after a period. Please download important results in time.
auth.me.security.coming_soon: More security settings are coming soon.
auth.me.preferences.desc: These settings affect your default experience on ToolboxNova.
auth.me.help.desc: Having issues or want us to add new tools? We'd love to hear your feedback.
auth.me.danger.logout_desc: Signing out will not delete your data. You can sign back in anytime.
auth.me.danger.delete_desc: Deleting your account will remove all data. This action cannot be undone.
auth.me.error.load_failed: Failed to load account info. Please refresh or try again later.
auth.me.error.session_expired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.
auth.me.confirm.logout: Are you sure you want to sign out?
auth.me.confirm.clear_history: This cannot be undone. Are you sure?
auth.me.confirm.delete_account: Account deletion is irreversible. Please proceed with caution.
auth.error.title: Sign In Failed
auth.error.description: An error occurred during sign in
auth.error.missing_params: Authorization parameters are missing. Please try again.
auth.error.invalid_state: The login session has expired. Please start over.
auth.error.token_exchange: Could not verify your account. Please try again.
auth.error.session_failed: Session creation failed. Please try again.
